commonCitations.medical_records_fees_hospital: 42 Pa.C.S. § 6152 (CPI-adjusted; ~$2.50/p pp.1-10, ~$0.75 pp.11-50, ~$0.50 pp.51+; ~$29.61 search fee — implementer should pull current Department of Health table at draft time)
commonCitations.hospital_lien: No statutory hospital lien; contractual subrogation; Medicaid third-party recovery 62 P.S. § 1409
commonCitations.minor_settlement_approval: Pa.R.C.P. No. 2039 (guardian petition; ~$25K threshold; insured account / annuity / trust)
commonCitations.tort_claims_act_notice: 42 Pa.C.S. §§ 8521-8522 (Sovereign Immunity Act, 9 exceptions; $250K/$1M cap); §§ 8541-8542 (Political Subdivision Tort Claims Act)
commonCitations.tort_claims_act_deadline_days: 180 days (6 months) notice for both Sovereign and Political Subdivision Acts
commonCitations.contingency_fee_rule: Pa. R. Prof. C. 1.5 (reasonableness standard; written agreement); MCARE 40 P.S. § 1303.506 framework for medmal-related fees
commonCitations.certificate_of_merit_medmal: Pa.R.C.P. No. 1042.3 (60-day certificate of merit; ALL professional-liability actions, not just medmal)
commonCitations.damages_cap_medmal_noneconomic: No statutory cap; punitive damages cap 2x compensatory under 40 P.S. § 1303.505(d)
commonCitations.comparative_negligence_standard: 42 Pa.C.S. § 7102 (modified 51% bar); Fair Share Act (2011) limits joint-and-several to specific scenarios
commonCitations.threshold_serious_injury: 75 Pa.C.S. § 1705 (limited-tort MVA option; 'serious injury' = death, serious impairment of body function, or permanent serious disfigurement)
commonCitations.attorneys_lien: Recupero v. Inverness Med. Innovations, Inc. — common-law charging lien
commonCitations.mcare_pre_suit: 40 P.S. § 1303.711 et seq. (MCARE Act medmal framework — venue, expert qualifications, peer-review immunity)
